chapters.title: SYNONYMNS FOR HOUSES
chapters.content_preview: SYNONYMNS FOR HOUSES  The first house is named as hora, tanu, (body) moorti, (comple- xion) udaya, (rising) shir, (head). The second is called vaag (speech), vitta (wealth), kutumba (family), eye. The 3rd is called sahotha (brother), dushchikya. gala (throat). The 4th is called s

chapters.title: TRAITS OF PLANETS AND SIGNS
chapters.content_preview: TRAITS OF PLANETS AND SIGNS  Sun is red coloured. Moon is white, Mercury green, Jupiter yellow, Venus of variegated colour, Saturp is blue. The devata of Sun is Agni, (fire) that of Moon is Jala (water), of Mercury Vishnu (protection), of Jupiter Indra (wealth), of Venus Indrani

chapters.title: FRIENDSHIP ETC
chapters.content_preview: FRIENDSHIP ETC  The Sun considers Jupiter, Mars and Moon as its friends, It is neutral towards Mercury. It is inimical to Saturn and Venus. Moon considers the Sun and Mercury as its friends. It treats the rest i.e. Saturn, Venus, Jupiter and Mars as a neutral. Mars treats Sun, Mo

chapters.title: DIRECTIONAL STRENGTH
chapters.content_preview: DIRECTIONAL STRENGTH  Jupiter and Mercury have full directional strength when located in the ascendant. Mars & Sun get this full strength when located in the 10th house, Saturn gets it when located in the 7th house. Moon and Venus get full directional strength when situated in th

chapters.title: TEMPORAL STRENGTH
chapters.content_preview: TEMPORAL STRENGTH  Sun etc. located in their own month hora, day or year are con- sidered as strong in temporal strength. (101) i.e. Sun in the Bhadon month (August and September), Moon in its own hora division” Mars on Tuesday & Saturn in the year when it is in its own sign, Cap

chapters.title: TIME (KAAL) STRENGTH
chapters.content_preview: TIME (KAAL) STRENGTH  Saturn, Moon and Mars get strengthened in a night birth. The Sun. Jupiter and Venus get strengthened in a day birth. Mercury 15 strong both in day and night births. Benefic planets get strength- ened in the bright fortnight of the Moon while the malefics get

chapters.content_preview: ASPECT STRENGTH ETC.  The planets aspected by benefics and unaspected by malefics are strong so far as the question of aspect is concerned. chapters.title: MAIN RULING PERIOD OF KETU
chapters.content_preview: MAIN RULING PERIOD OF KETU  भार्या पुत्र विनाशनं नरपते ्रौतिर्महत्कष्टतां विद्याबन्धुधनाप्तिपित्ररहितं रोगाग्निमित्रैभयम्‌ ।  यानारोहणयातन॑ विषजलै : शस्त्रादि भिर्वा भयम्‌ देशाद देश विवासनं कलि रुचिं देहादिभिर्वा भयम्‌ ।।१।।

chapters.title: SUB PERIODS IN MAIN PERIODS OF SUN
chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN MAIN PERIODS OF SUN  लग्नगस्य रवे : पाके भौमार्किशिखिभोगिनाम । अतदशायां दुः खं च राज्यार्थगृहनाशनम्‌ ।।१।।  तेषामगोचरस्थानां दिनेशात्फलमीदृशम्‌ | गोचरस्ये फलं सौख्यं सर्वस्मिन्‌ पाकपादगृहे ।।२।।

chapters.title: SUB PERIODS IN MAIN DASA OF MARS
chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN MAIN DASA OF MARS  गाग्नस्थितधरासूनो ; परिपाके व्रणं क्षतम्‌ । पापपक्तौ महत्कष्टमजीर्णादिमहद्भयम ।।१।। शुभभुक्ती नृपात्प्रीतिं भ्रातृवर्गभवं सुखम | तथाविधधरासूनोदशायां क्षेत्रवाहने ।।२।। धनस्थितधरासूनो: शुभभुक्तियदा तदा । wed मगोत्साहं विद्यावाहनभूषणम । 1३11

chapters.title: SUB PERIODS IN THE MAIN PERIOD OF RAHU
chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN THE MAIN PERIOD OF RAHU  लग्नस्थसेहिकेयस्य दये पापहृतिर्यदा ।  करोति दुःखबाहुल्यं नृपचौराग्निपीडनम्‌ 11211 तत्रस्यभोगिन : पाके शुभमुक्तो शुभं वदेत्‌ । गृहक्षेतरादिवृद्विश्च भोजनांबरभूषणमं ।।२।।

chapters.title: कवचित्सौख्यं कवचित्कीति कवचिद्र म॑ FATE ।।९।।
chapters.content_preview: कवचित्सौख्यं कवचित्कीति कवचिद्र म॑ FATE ।।९।। 351  ---  ## Page 355  एवमादौ तु भुक्त्य॑ते राजकोपाढन क्षयम्‌ ।

chapters.title: SUB PERIODS IN DASA OF JUPITER
chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN DASA OF JUPITER  कैन्द्रस्थितस्य जीवस्य दशायां वेह पीड़नम । पापतो तथा दुःखं राजकोप॑ धन क्षयम्‌ ।।१।।  कृषि गो भूमि नाशं च विरोधं ब्रन्धुमिसह । उत्साह st वैक॑ल्यमादौ चान्ते शुभं वदेत ।।२।। भुक्तौ शुभानां तत्काले गुरो : केन्द्र गतस्य तु ।

chapters.title: SUB PERIODS IN DASA OF SATURN
chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN DASA OF SATURN  केन्द्रस्थस्य शनेर्दयि यदा पाप ERE | स्थानच्युतिं प्रवासं च नृपचौराग्निपीडनम्‌ ।।१।।  तथातरिधशनेदयि शुभभुक्ती महत्सुखम्‌ | नृपापिषेकमर्थाप्ति देशग्रामोधिपत्यताम ।।२।।

chapters.content_preview: SUB PERIODS IN THE MAIN PERIOD OF VENUS  केद्रस्थितस्य शक्रस्य सोम्यानां तु हतिर्यदा । राजयाप्ति राजसन्मानं यानांबरविभूषणम 1g 11  उत्साहं कीतिसंपत्तिस्त्रीपुत्रधनसंपद : । भाग्योत्तर मनोधघेय्य राज्ाराधिपत्यताम्‌ ।1२।।
